text: carbs is 0.9g. but the real story is the context, not the nutrition profile.

pros first. a useful low-calorie flavor tool because as a swap for heavy sauces or dressings, it has some real value. clear real-world role because if a misc item helps or harms behavior, that matters a lot. context tells the real story because that is the whole point of misc.

now the downsides. health claims are usually exaggerated because the item tends to be oversold way beyond what it deserves. easy to overrate or misuse because this category attracts strong marketing and habits. better replacements often exist because that practical comparison matters.
Apple Cider Vinegar is D tier. Best treated as an occasional context item, not a nutritional base.
